name: A heavy box just fell on my head at my warehouse job—what do I need to do right now?

mainEntity.name: A heavy box just fell on my head at my warehouse job—what do I need to do right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Seek medical attention immediately for potential head trauma, then formally report the injury to your supervisor. Document the scene with photos and identify witnesses to ensure your workers compensation claim is protected from the start.
